teams.title: Teams
teams.adminOnly: Only admins can view the teams list.
teams.empty: No teams yet. Import users via admin to create teams.

concept.title: The concept
concept.p1: Surface helps small companies collect honest, mostly anonymous feedback from employees and turn it into clear, aggregated themes and actions for managers. The product focuses on enabling "venting" and structured peer/manager feedback while protecting anonymity and giving managers a simple dashboard view of team health.
concept.p2: Employees submit one anonymous rant per cycle (with optional tags) and structured feedback for every other team member. Managers see anonymized themes, example comments (when thresholds are met), and can log multiple actions per theme so the loop closes and people feel heard.
concept.p3: The system uses AI to de-identify text and infer theme and sentiment; all feedback is aggregated into anonymized insights with configurable anonymity thresholds.
